title: thelypteris noveboracensis
intro: Thelypteris noveboracensis, also known as the New York fern or eastern marsh fern, is a species of fern native to eastern North America, characterized by its delicate fronds and ability to thrive in wet environments. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects, which can help alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The health benefits of Thelypteris noveboracensis include soothing coughs, reducing inflammation, and supporting the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for easy consumption and harnessing of its medicinal properties.
